body.purpose: Descriptions, table cells, and form values.

label.purpose: Form labels, metric labels, and helper labels.

shadows.name: surface-hairline
shadows.purpose: Default panel and metric elevation only.

motion.name: state-ease
motion.purpose: Default state transitions for buttons and interactive rows.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary commit action for forms and exports.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 46px; min-width: 136px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0 16px; background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 750; transition: background-color 180ms ease-out, transform 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgb(29 78 216 / 0.38); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard form field for amount, date, note, and category inputs.
components.html: <label class="ds-field">จำนวนเงิน<input value="120" /></label>
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #475569; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 650; } .ds-field input { min-height: 46px; border: 1px solid #d6dce6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #172033; font: inherit; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgb(29 78 216 / 0.38); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Default container for dashboard sections, forms, and settings actions.
components.html:
รายจ่ายตามหมวด

ค่าอาหาร ฿180
components.css: .ds-panel { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #172033; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04); } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 1.1rem; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: #475569; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Dark rail navigation item with active state.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { min-height: 46px; width: 100%; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; background: transparent; color: #cbd5e1; text-align: left; font-weight: 650; } .ds-nav-item-active, .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #1f2937; color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-item-active { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgb(96 165 250 / 0.24); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgb(29 78 216 / 0.38); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Compact status marker for transaction type and category state.
components.css: .ds-pill-income { display: inline-flex; border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 8px; background: #dcfce7; color: #166534; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 800; }

narrative.overview: Money Flow should feel like a clear desk with a reliable ledger open: quiet, structured, and ready for repeated use. The interface now uses a more colorful but semantic product palette: blue actions, money-state colors, and pale full-panel washes.
keyCharacteristics: Dense enough for daily use, but never cramped below 46px primary control height.
Thai workflow copy, predictable product UI patterns, and minimal decoration.
Charts must have textual equivalents; visual color is never the only source of meaning.

rules.name: The Semantic Money Rule
rules.body: Green, red, and blue are reserved for income, expense, and balance. Blue also owns primary actions through the Action Blue token.

rules.name: The Soft Wash Rule
rules.body: Color may tint a whole panel or state, never a side stripe. Washes must stay pale enough for dark text and charts.

rules.name: The Task Typography Rule
rules.body: Do not use display fonts, gradient text, or letter-spaced labels. Product clarity wins over personality.

rules.name: The Low Lift Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are almost flat. If a shadow is visible before the border is visible, it is too strong.

dos: Do keep all primary controls at 46px height and all touch targets at least 44px.
Do provide a text equivalent for every chart.
Do keep mobile entry single-column and full-width.
Do confirm destructive actions before changing local data.
Do use soft full-panel washes for analytics/settings grouping when color improves scanning.
donts: Don't make it feel like a marketing landing page.
Don't use decorative finance clichés such as navy-and-gold luxury styling, gradient hero metrics, or glassmorphism.
Don't hide core functionality on mobile.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, or decorative blur effects.
Don't introduce cloud/account concepts into v1 screens.
